message:
Refactor to unified generate:* script naming

Renames sync:changelog to generate:changelog and introduces a unified
`pnpm generate` command that runs all content generation scripts. Updates
CI workflow to use separate generate and build jobs, with artifacts passed
between them for main branch builds.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,8 +42,10 @@ import ParsingOptions from '@partials/operators/ParsingOptions.mdx';
 
 Some content is auto-generated and excluded from linting:
 
-- **Changelog**: Run `pnpm sync:changelog` to fetch from `tenzir/news` repo.
+- **Changelog**: Run `pnpm generate:changelog` to fetch from `tenzir/news` repo.
   Generated files: `src/content/docs/changelog/`, `src/sidebar-changelog.ts`.
+- **Docs Map**: Run `pnpm generate:docs-map` to create the documentation map.
+  Generated file: `public/tenzir_docs_map.md`.
 
 ### Linting

@@ -17,8 +17,48 @@ concurrency:
   cancel-in-progress: false
 
 jobs:
+  generate:
+    name: Generate
+    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: recursive
+
+      - name: Install pnpm
+        run: npm install -g pnpm
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js and pnpm
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "20"
+          cache: "pnpm"
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod
+
+      - name: Generate changelog
+        run: pnpm generate:changelog
+
+      - name: Generate docs map
+        run: pnpm generate:docs-map
+
+      - name: Upload generated content
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: generated-content
+          path: |
+            src/content/docs/changelog/
+            src/sidebar-changelog.generated.ts
+            src/unified-timeline-data.generated.ts
+            public/tenzir_docs_map.md
+
   build:
     name: Build
+    needs: generate
+    if: always() && (needs.generate.result == 'success' || needs.generate.result == 'skipped')
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
@@ -42,10 +82,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install uv
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
 
-      - name: Sync external content
+      - name: Download generated content
         if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
-        run: |
-          pnpm sync:changelog
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: generated-content
 
       - name: Setup GitHub Pages
         id: pages

@@ -8,7 +8,9 @@
     "build": "astro build",
     "preview": "astro preview",
     "astro": "astro",
-    "sync:changelog": "node scripts/sync-changelog.mjs",
+    "generate": "pnpm generate:changelog && pnpm generate:docs-map",
+    "generate:changelog": "node scripts/sync-changelog.mjs",
+    "generate:docs-map": "node scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs",
     "sync:openapi": "bash scripts/sync-openapi.sh",
     "lint": "pnpm run lint:markdown && pnpm run lint:eslint && pnpm run lint:prettier",
     "lint:markdown": "markdownlint '**/*.md' '**/*.mdx' --ignore node_modules --ignore .astro",
@@ -18,8 +20,7 @@
     "lint:prettier": "prettier --check .",
     "lint:prettier:fix": "prettier --write .",
     "build:linkcheck": "CHECK_LINKS=true pnpm build",
-    "build:full": "pnpm generate:docs-map && CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true pnpm build",
-    "generate:docs-map": "node scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs",
+    "build:full": "pnpm generate && CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true pnpm build",
     "lint:fix": "pnpm run lint:markdown:fix && pnpm run lint:eslint:fix && pnpm run lint:prettier:fix",
     "postinstall": "node scripts/fix-starlight-llms-txt.js"
   },

@@ -2,6 +2,6 @@
 title: Changelog
 ---
 
-The changelog is populated during CI builds. Run `pnpm sync:changelog` locally
-to fetch release notes from the [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news)
-repository.
+The changelog is populated during CI builds. Run `pnpm generate:changelog`
+locally to fetch release notes from the
+[tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news) repository.

@@ -10,13 +10,14 @@ https://github.com/tenzir/docs. We use [Astro](https://astro.build) with
 
 ### Essential Commands
 
-| Command               | Action                                                            |
-| :-------------------- | :---------------------------------------------------------------- |
-| `pnpm install`        | Install dependencies                                              |
-| `pnpm dev`            | Start local dev server at `localhost:4321`                        |
-| `pnpm build`          | Build production site to `./dist/`                                |
-| `pnpm preview`        | Preview build locally before deploying                            |
-| `pnpm sync:changelog` | Sync changelog from [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news) |
+| Command                   | Action                                                            |
+| :------------------------ | :---------------------------------------------------------------- |
+| `pnpm install`            | Install dependencies                                              |
+| `pnpm dev`                | Start local dev server at `localhost:4321`                        |
+| `pnpm build`              | Build production site to `./dist/`                                |
+| `pnpm preview`            | Preview build locally before deploying                            |
+| `pnpm generate:changelog` | Sync changelog from [tenzir/news](https://github.com/tenzir/news) |
+| `pnpm generate:docs-map`  | Generate documentation map for AI agents                          |
 
 ### Development Commands
